headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Boston Scientific (BSX) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Boston Scientific is starting to look attractively priced, you are not alone, especially after a choppy run in the share price. The stock last closed at US$73.85, with returns of a 1.7% decline over 7 days, a 21.0% decline over 30 days, a 22.0% decline year to date, but gains of 57.1% over 3 years and 86.7% over 5 years. This combination can raise questions about how much optimism is already reflected in the price. Recent headlines around Boston Scientific have...
